findings.details: Post 01 is titled 'What to Ask Your Dad Before Father's Day: 50 Questions Worth Recording in His Own Voice' but its primary_keyword is 'fathers day gift ideas'. The title contains no gift framing — it's pure 'questions to ask dad' content. It will not rank for the head term 'fathers day gift ideas' because the title, H1, and on-page intent are about conversation prompts, not gift shopping. Meanwhile Post 06 already targets the questions long-tail ('questions to ask dad before its too late'), so Post 01 ends up competing with Post 06 on intent while being mis-mapped to a keyword it cannot win.
findings.suggested_fix: Either (a) retitle Post 01 to actually lead with a gift angle (e.g. 'The Father's Day Gift He'll Actually Keep: 50 Questions That Capture Dad's Voice') so it has a shot at 'fathers day gift ideas', or (b) reassign Post 01's primary_keyword to something that matches its current title (e.g. 'meaningful fathers day gift' or 'preserve dads voice') and let another post own the head term.
findings.title: Post 01 primary keyword does not match its title/intent
